arts.ttl: Tuchel drops three from England squad to face Albania
arts.sum: England head coach Thomas Tuchel leaves Morgan Gibbs-White, Jarrell Quansah and Aaron Ramsdale out of his matchday squad to face Albania at Wembley.

It’s the start of a new era for England, as Thomas Tuchel takes charge for the first time. arts.ttl: Alan Shearer admits shock at Thomas Tuchel call-up after urging England pick to retire
arts.sum: Newcastle legend Alan Shearer has admitted he was surprised to see Dan Burn called up for England duty by Thomas Tuchel, days after joking with him about retirement

arts.ttl: Harry Kane: Tottenham to Bayern move led to improved 'aura'
arts.sum: Harry Kane has said he sees himself with a real chance of winning the next men's Ballon d'Or, adding his "aura" as a player has improved since joining Bayern Munich . "Just being at a club like Bayern Munich has helped push me on even more, confidence-wise and responsibility-wise," Kane told reporters ahead of Friday's World Cup qualifier against Albania .

arts.ttl: Kane excited about new England chapter under Tuchel
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane says the team are "excited to start a new chapter" under new manager Thomas Tuchel before their 2026 World Cup qualifier against Albania at Wembley.

arts.ttl: Why Tuchel is the 'perfect fit' for England
arts.sum: BBC Sport pundit Thomas Hitzlsperger discusses the tactics of new England manager Thomas Tuchel before Friday's game against Albania.
